overall.description: Third-person game engine footage showing a character walking through a modern urban park. The journey transitions from a plaza with a distinctive pink contemporary building through open rock gardens with large boulder formations and dirt paths, ending in a narrow rocky canyon with paved walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with modern stadium building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved plaza beside a large pink modern stadium building with glass atrium

entered.detail: large pink building with multiple windows and glass atrium structure
modern glass and steel entrance structure with diagonal beams
wide open paved walking area with gray surface
row of green trees marking the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide paved plaza next to a distinctive pink modern stadium building with a glass atrium. The area is open and sunny with a line of trees visible to the right, creating an urban park atmosphere.

events.description: turning right away from the modern building toward the rocky park area

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward large rock formations visible in the distance

entered.detail: large dark rock formations rising from the ground
tall evergreen trees scattered across the park landscape

segments.scene_description: The character turns right away from the building and walks toward an area with large rock monoliths and scattered pine trees. The modern architecture fades from view as the natural rock formations become the dominant feature.

scene_state.functional_zone: park trail with pine trees and dirt ground

events.description: ground surface transitions from paved plaza to dirt trail
entering shaded area with tall pine trees overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path through a wooded park area with residential buildings visible in the distance

entered.detail: unpaved earth and grass mixed walking surface
multi-story apartment buildings visible on the horizon
clumps of green grass alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The ground changes to dirt as the character walks through a park area with pine trees providing partial shade. Residential buildings appear in the distance while the large rock formations move to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rock garden with scattered boulder formations

events.description: entering open rock garden area with scattered formations and sparse vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through an open dirt field surrounded by scattered rock formations and small bushes

entered.detail: wide open area of packed earth and dry grass
various sized boulders scattered throughout the landscape
low green shrubbery dotting the field
distant urban buildings on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open rock garden with scattered boulder formations across a dry dirt field. The pine trees recede behind as the landscape opens up to reveal a distant city skyline and sparse bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon pathway with paved crosswalk sections

events.description: entering narrow rocky canyon with tall boulder walls on both sides
crossing a marked pedestrian crosswalk on the paved path through the rocks

agents.ego_description: navigating through a rocky canyon following a paved path with zebra crossing markings

entered.detail: tall massive rock walls forming a narrow passage
paved black surface with white crosswalk stripes
white zebra stripes painted on the paved path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon where the scattered boulders now form tall enclosing walls. The path becomes paved asphalt with marked crosswalks as the character walks through the shaded canyon passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sunny, modern urban plaza into a narrow, shaded rocky canyon. It begins by following a character along a wide paved plaza beside a distinctive pink stadium building with a glass atrium, before turning away from the architecture toward a landscape of large rock monoliths and scattered pine trees. As the ground shifts from pavement to dirt, the scene opens into a wide rock garden of scattered boulders and dry fields that reveal a distant city skyline. The landscape then gradually tightens as the boulders evolve into tall enclosing walls, finally leading the character onto a paved asphalt path with crosswalks through the depths of a narrow canyon.
